name: Chocolate Peanut Butter Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl with an electric mixer on medium speed, beat together the cream cheese, peanut butter, and cinnamon until smooth.
2. Gradually add in the chocolate syrup and milk, beating continuously until well blended.
3. Serve the dip with assorted fruit, cookies, or pretzels.
Prep time: 5 minutes.
